programme.title: The Matrix
programme.desc: A computer hacker joins forces with rebel warriors to battle a malevolent cyberintelligence.

programme.title: The Matrix Reloaded
programme.desc: Freedom fighters (Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Carrie-Anne Moss) revolt against machines.

programme.title: The Matrix Revolutions
programme.desc: Neo, Morpheus and Trinity prepare for a final battle against vicious machines set to invade Zion.

programme.title: Pompeii
programme.desc: A gladiator tries to save the woman he loves while Mount Vesuvius rains down lava and ash.

programme.title: When a Stranger Calls
programme.desc: A sadistic phone caller terrorizes a teenage babysitter (Camilla Belle).

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy takes over humans' bodies, Melanie risks everything to protect her people.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: A magician (Edward Norton) vies with the heir to the Austro-Hungarian Empire for a woman's love.

programme.title: All I See Is You
programme.desc: A man starts to feel insecure when an operation allows his blind wife to see out of her right eye.

programme.title: The Lifeguard
programme.desc: A reporter quits her job, returns to her old lifeguard duties, and has an affair with a teenager.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A dead man is thought to be a victim of a hit-and-run accident; a mother requests an autopsy.

programme.title: Love & Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball hinders two people's (Sanaa Lathan, Omar Epps) relationship.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Diary Of A Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: A woman must put her life back together after her husband of 18 years kicks her out of the house.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim announces a salon contest; a trip to Las Vegas gets interesting when Naja seduces a team member.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim announces a salon contest; a trip to Las Vegas gets interesting when Naja seduces a team member.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A chauvinist puts a romantically challenged producer (Katherine Heigl) through outrageous tests.

programme.title: Romy and Michele's High School Reunion
programme.desc: Two pinheads (Mira Sorvino, Lisa Kudrow) try to impress former classmates.

programme.title: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: An aspiring singer (Piper Perabo) finds notoriety as a barmaid.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Doctor Parnassus
programme.desc: An immortal carnival master must collect five souls or else lose his daughter to the devil.

programme.title: The Happytime Murders
programme.desc: Two detectives -- one human and the other a puppet -- work together to find a killer in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Willy's Wonderland
programme.desc: A loner wages war against the possessed animatronic mascots of Willy's Wonderland.

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
programme.desc: Officer Dromoor seeks revenge after a defense attorney manipulates the law to a rapist's advantage.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: A mobster (Vin Diesel) decides to defend himself in court instead of ratting on his associates.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: A man plots revenge after a radio host tells his lover to end their relationship.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim announces a salon contest; a trip to Las Vegas gets interesting when Naja seduces a team member.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Diary Of A Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: A woman must put her life back together after her husband of 18 years kicks her out of the house.

programme.title: Breakin' All the Rules
programme.desc: The game is on and the rules are out as Jamie Foxx, Morris Chestnut, Jennifer Esposito and Gabrielle Union star in this outrageous comedy that rewrites the book of love.

programme.title: Breakin' All the Rules
programme.desc: The game is on and the rules are out as Jamie Foxx, Morris Chestnut, Jennifer Esposito and Gabrielle Union star in this outrageous comedy that rewrites the book of love.

programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: The challenges of impending parenthood turn the lives of five couples upside down.

programme.title: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: An aspiring singer (Piper Perabo) finds notoriety as a barmaid.
